reviews.review_msg: EXTREMELY nice prof, accent is tough to understand at times. You have to stay on top of the assignments/reports due almost every week, or else you will definitely fall behind. First half of the course is much easier than the second. Class WILL be boring but you have to go anyway to write quizes almost every class. So-so class, study hard!

Has a very strong accent and her lectures were boring. Couldn't even understand what she was saying which really affected our grades. Half the class ended up dropping by the end of this semester. Definitely not recommended.

Very easy marker to go with a very easy course (average for final was roughly 82%). Joyce's curve allows nearly 30% of students to get A's.  The only real bad thing about the course is that her guidelines are way too vague.

Overall, the course is easy. It is a bit hard to understand her accent. Her lectures are boring, as she reads off the slides like a student giving a presentation in tutorial for the first time. There were only 2 small assignments, which were super easy, 1 individual presentation, 1 group presentation, midterm, and final.
